user.title: Set up Dial-a-Story
user.description: Configure your AI bedtime stories hotline.

data_description.telnyx_api_key: API key from your Telnyx portal
data_description.elevenlabs_api_key: Optional API key for natural-sounding ElevenLabs voices
data_description.story_length: Length of generated stories: short (~200 words), medium (~350), or long (~500)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Dial-a-Story
reauth_confirm.description: Your API credentials are no longer valid. Please provide updated keys.

data_description.telnyx_api_key: Updated API key from your Telnyx portal
data_description.elevenlabs_api_key: Optional updated API key for ElevenLabs voices

data_description.telnyx_api_key: API key from your Telnyx portal
data_description.elevenlabs_api_key: Optional API key for natural-sounding ElevenLabs voices
data_description.story_length: Length of generated stories: short (~200 words), medium (~350), or long (~500)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Telnyx API. Please check your network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid Telnyx API key. Please check your credentials.

set_story.name: Set story
set_story.description: Queue a story to be read on the next phone call.

story.name: Story
story.description: The full text of the story to read.

clear_story.name: Clear story
clear_story.description: Remove the queued story so the next call uses AI-generated stories.
